name: RunLLMSkill
description: Executes an LLM-powered Skill defined in a Markdown file against the current Pull Request. Supports Claude, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Ollama.
helpMarkDown: Define your skill in a `.md` file with YAML frontmatter (see examples/code-review.md). Reference it via the `skillFile` input.
author: SkillFlow

inputs.name: skillFile
inputs.label: Skill File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the Skill `.md` file relative to the repository root. The file must have YAML frontmatter and a markdown body.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsUrl
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Organization URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: The URL of your Azure DevOps organization (e.g., https://dev.azure.com/myorg).

inputs.name: projectName
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The name of the Azure DevOps project.

inputs.name: repositoryId
inputs.label: Repository ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: The ID of the Git repository.

inputs.name: pullRequestId
inputs.label: Pull Request ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: The ID of the Pull Request to analyze.

inputs.name: accessToken
inputs.label: Access Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token (PAT) or System.AccessToken. Needs read/write access to the repository and pull requests.

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.label: Verbose Logging
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable verbose logging to see agent reasoning steps.
